response.justification: Despite extensive senior-level experience, the candidate lacks entry-level alignment: Java is only listed as a skill without project context, German is only basic (not fluent as required), and the resume reflects a senior/lead profile with no indication of willingness to start as a junior contributor in an insurance-focused agile team.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and domains
Strong track record in open-source contributions and technical workshops
Demonstrated proficiency in agile practices, CI/CD, and cloud technologies
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, not fluent as required for client collaboration
Resume portrays senior/lead experience, not entry-level readiness or humility
Java experience is listed but not demonstrated in any project context or role
